Happy Birthday
Sakshi 🎂
🎉 Wishing you a magical day 🎉
Your Special Cake 🕯️

🕯️ A cake as sweet as you, Sakshi!

Beautiful Sakshi 🌸
Royal & Graceful 👑
Nature's Queen 🌺
Pretty & Radiant ✨
Sweet Soul 💖
A Wish from the Heart 💌
🌟 🎂 🌟
Sakshi, aaj tera din hai — aur tu ek khaas roshni hai! 🌸
Tujhe mila ho teri muskan jitni khushi,
Teri aankhon mein jo sapne hain — woh sab poore hon 💫

May your life be filled with love, laughter, and endless joy 🌈
You deserve every beautiful thing this world has to offer ✨

जन्मदिन मुबारक हो Sakshi! 🎉
Tere har sapne ko pankh mile, har pal mein khushi mile 🕊️
